message:
Reference Agent Skills specification in meta plugin

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,8 @@
 # Skills
 
+Consult the [Agent Skills specification](https://agentskills.io/specification.md)
+for the authoritative reference on skill structure and best practices.
+
 ## Naming
 
 Use gerund form (verb + -ing): `writing-commit-messages`, `managing-changelogs`
